calling_convention.carry_meaning: Standard success/failure flag (C=0 success, C=1 error unless overridden)
calling_convention.decimal_mode: Clear at every public entry and exit boundary
calling_convention.overflow_usage: Result only for declared signed comparison/ABI
calling_convention.negative_usage: Result only for declared comparison/sign-test ABI

routines.name: irq_entry
routines.purpose: Pinned entry: save A/X/Y/mapping, UDTIM, cursor, SCNKEY, CIA ack, restore, RTI
routines.inputs: hardware IRQ frame (CPU has pushed PC/P; A/X/Y are live)
routines.side_effects: Advances jiffy clock, updates keyboard state, blinks cursor

routines.name: irq_update_jiffy
routines.side_effects: Calls KERNAL UDTIM directly while IRQ entry owns $01=$36

routines.name: irq_cursor_blink
routines.purpose: Bounded resident cursor service; no geoRAM dependency
routines.side_effects: Toggles cursor visibility state in zp_crsr_vis

routines.name: irq_scan_keyboard
routines.side_effects: Calls KERNAL SCNKEY directly after cursor service

routines.name: irq_restore_mapping
routines.side_effects: Does not touch geoRAM selection

routines.name: screen_init
routines.side_effects: Initializes screen editor state, clears screen

routines.name: screen_clear
routines.side_effects: Clears screen, homes cursor

routines.name: screen_scroll_up
routines.side_effects: Scrolls screen memory up one line

routines.name: screen_putchar
routines.side_effects: Writes character at cursor, advances cursor

routines.name: screen_getchar
routines.side_effects: Reads character at cursor position

routines.name: screen_cursor_on
routines.side_effects: Sets cursor visible flag

routines.name: screen_cursor_off
routines.side_effects: Clears cursor visible flag

routines.name: screen_cursor_right
routines.side_effects: Advances cursor column, wraps to next line

routines.name: screen_cursor_left
routines.side_effects: Retreats cursor column, wraps to prev line

routines.name: screen_cursor_down
routines.side_effects: Advances cursor row, scrolls if needed

routines.name: screen_cursor_up
routines.side_effects: Retreats cursor row

routines.name: screen_line_input
routines.purpose: Bounded line capture for editor; respects quote mode
routines.side_effects: Captures one logical line from screen into buffer

routines.name: kernal_readst
routines.side_effects: Reads KERNAL status

routines.name: kernal_setlfs
routines.side_effects: Sets logical/device/secondary parameters; does not open

routines.name: kernal_setnam
routines.side_effects: Sets filename for next OPEN/LOAD/SAVE

routines.name: kernal_open
routines.side_effects: Opens file/channel

routines.name: kernal_close
routines.side_effects: Closes logical file

routines.name: kernal_chkin
routines.side_effects: Sets input channel

routines.name: kernal_chkout
routines.side_effects: Sets output channel

routines.name: kernal_clrchn
routines.side_effects: Restores default channels

routines.name: kernal_chrin
routines.side_effects: Reads byte from input channel

routines.name: kernal_chrout
routines.side_effects: Writes byte to output channel

routines.name: kernal_print_packed
routines.inputs: X/Y=packed string with bit 7 set on final character
routines.side_effects: Masks and emits bytes through the final-character marker

routines.name: kernal_load
routines.side_effects: Loads from device

routines.name: kernal_save
routines.side_effects: Saves to device

routines.name: kernal_settim
routines.side_effects: Sets jiffy clock

routines.name: kernal_rdtim
routines.side_effects: Reads jiffy clock

routines.name: kernal_stop
routines.side_effects: Checks STOP key

routines.name: kernal_getin
routines.side_effects: Reads from keyboard buffer

routines.name: kernal_udtim
routines.side_effects: Advances jiffy clock one tick

routines.name: kernal_scnkey
routines.side_effects: Scans keyboard matrix

routines.name: georam_call_group_n
routines.purpose: Generated returning entry for each 256-ID group
routines.inputs: X=routine index; target inputs per generated ABI
routines.clobbers: dispatch X plus generated target clobbers
routines.side_effects: Resolves group tables, calls target, captures results, restores caller selection/P

routines.name: georam_tail_group_n
routines.purpose: Generated tail-transfer entry; not an alias of returning call
routines.inputs: X=routine index; target inputs per generated ABI
routines.outputs: does not return to current frame
routines.clobbers: dispatch X plus generated target clobbers
routines.side_effects: Reuses/removes current context frame before transfer

routines.name: georam_ctx_push
routines.purpose: Internal: save caller geoRAM state before nesting
routines.side_effects: Pushes current block/page/registers onto context stack

routines.name: georam_ctx_pop
routines.purpose: Internal: restore before returning to caller
routines.side_effects: Pops and restores caller block/page/registers from context stack

routines.name: georam_select
routines.side_effects: Writes $DFFE and $DFFF; updates software mirror

routines.name: hibasic_graphics_reserve
routines.purpose: Save occupied HIBASIC bytes before graphics claims high RAM
routines.side_effects: Copies HIBASIC to dedicated geoRAM block 31 pages 32 onward

routines.name: hibasic_graphics_restore
routines.purpose: Restore displaced HIBASIC bytes and release graphics reservation
routines.side_effects: Copies dedicated geoRAM backing bytes to HIBASIC

routines.name: georam_read_byte
routines.side_effects: Maps, validates, and restores caller selection

routines.name: georam_read_word
routines.side_effects: Rejects boundary/owner/generation errors; restores selection

routines.name: georam_write_byte
routines.side_effects: Maps, validates, writes, restores caller selection

routines.name: georam_write_word
routines.side_effects: Rejects cross-boundary/owner/generation errors

routines.name: georam_copy_from_ram
routines.side_effects: Copies normal RAM to geoRAM and restores selection

routines.name: georam_copy_to_ram
routines.side_effects: Copies geoRAM to normal RAM and restores selection

routines.name: georam_copy_pages
routines.inputs: X/Y=source descriptor; source ptr fields point to destination descriptor
routines.side_effects: Copies through resident scratch and restores caller selection

routines.name: georam_checksum
routines.side_effects: Restores caller selection

routines.name: georam_verify_mirror
routines.side_effects: Debug-only: compares software mirror against $DFFE/$DFFF

routines.name: ram_under_io_enter
routines.side_effects: Selects all-RAM mapping; masks IRQ

routines.name: ram_under_io_exit
routines.side_effects: Restores $35 mapping; restores incoming IRQ state

routines.name: ram_under_io_copy_in
routines.purpose: Bounded chunk copy for screen matrix
routines.side_effects: Copies bytes from normal RAM into $D000-$DFFF region through gate

routines.name: ram_under_io_copy_out
routines.side_effects: Copies bytes from $D000-$DFFF region out to normal RAM through gate

routines.name: loader_entry
routines.outputs: jumps to compiler_init on success; C=1 + ERR_LOAD on failure
routines.side_effects: Dual-device probe, prefer geoRAM store, load GEORAM image, REU patch if REU store, fingerprint skip-reload, publish expansion profile

routines.name: loader_detect_georam
routines.outputs: C=0 selected store published (X/Y=geo pages when geo), C=1 neither valid
routines.side_effects: Non-destructive dual probe; prefers geoRAM store; publishes expansion profile

routines.name: georam_stream_load
routines.side_effects: Opens CGS1 sidecar and decompresses chunks directly to geoRAM

routines.name: georam_load_georam_file
routines.purpose: Reads the geoRAM page image from D64
routines.side_effects: Loads GEORAM file from disk into geoRAM pages via kernal_load

routines.name: georam_install_pages
routines.side_effects: Copies loaded image into geoRAM pages, byte-by-byte through window

routines.name: loader_install_ram_payload
routines.side_effects: Copies/decompresses RAM payload to runtime locations

routines.name: loader_restore_banking
routines.side_effects: Restores $01=$35 canonical runtime mapping

routines.name: loader_check_sentinel
routines.side_effects: Verifies $FFF9 guard byte

routines.name: compiler_init
routines.side_effects: Clears BSS, latches bootstrap phase, inits arenas, inits editor, installs IRQ/NMI vectors, enters main loop

routines.name: init_clear_bss
routines.side_effects: Zeroes COMPILER_BSS segment

routines.name: init_arenas
routines.side_effects: Constructs arena directory, stamps generations

routines.name: init_editor
routines.side_effects: Initializes editor state, clears screen

routines.name: init_enter_main_loop
routines.side_effects: Enters editor main loop

routines.name: token_init
routines.side_effects: Sets up tokenizer state for a new line

routines.name: token_next
routines.purpose: Primary tokenizer entry: scan and return next token
routines.side_effects: Advances to next token; updates scan pointer

routines.name: token_peek
routines.side_effects: Looks ahead one token without advancing

routines.name: token_identifier
routines.purpose: O(candidate length + declared transition bound), with no full-table fallback
routines.inputs: active dialect table and scan state
routines.outputs: A=keyword ID or `$00`; identifier in scratch
routines.side_effects: Traverses generated first-character trie; accepts only enabled dialect nodes

routines.name: token_number
routines.outputs: value in FAC1 or integer register
routines.side_effects: Scans numeric literal, converts to internal form

routines.name: token_string
routines.side_effects: Scans quoted string literal (respects quote mode)

routines.name: token_skip_whitespace
routines.side_effects: Advances past spaces/tabs

routines.name: token_rem
routines.side_effects: Skips rest of line (REM content)

routines.name: token_data
routines.side_effects: Collects DATA values as raw tokens until EOL

routines.name: parse_line
routines.side_effects: Parses one complete program or direct line

routines.name: parse_statement
routines.side_effects: Parses one statement, dispatches to statement handler

routines.name: parse_expression
routines.outputs: type in `zp_expr_type`, value in FAC1 or accumulator
routines.side_effects: Full expression parser (Pratt: handles precedence, functions, operators)

routines.name: parse_primary
routines.outputs: value in FAC1 or string ptr
routines.side_effects: Parses primary: number, string, variable, function call, (expr)

routines.name: parse_term
routines.side_effects: Parses *, /

routines.name: parse_factor
routines.side_effects: Parses unary -, NOT, ^

routines.name: parse_function_call
routines.side_effects: Parses function argument list, calls function

routines.name: parse_array_ref
routines.side_effects: Parses array subscript(s), resolves element

routines.name: parse_for
routines.side_effects: Parses FOR var=start TO end [STEP inc], pushes loop frame

routines.name: parse_gosub
routines.side_effects: Parses GOSUB line, validates target

routines.name: semantic_validate_dialect
routines.purpose: Tokenizer already prevents disabled extended tokens from being stored
routines.outputs: C=1 if invalid in current dialect
routines.side_effects: Defense-in-depth for loaded/versioned token streams

routines.name: semantic_classify_direct
routines.outputs: C=1 if direct-only in program line
routines.side_effects: Rejects direct-only commands in stored-program context

routines.name: semantic_validate_line
routines.purpose: Transactional syntax validation (step 3 of line entry)
routines.side_effects: Full syntax/dialect validation of one line

routines.name: semantic_check_for_dialect
routines.side_effects: Returns BASIC2_DIALECT or BASIC35_DIALECT

routines.name: semantic_set_dialect
routines.side_effects: Sets active dialect mode

routines.name: semantic_get_numeric_mode
routines.side_effects: Reads legacy/IEEE mode independently of dialect

routines.name: semantic_set_numeric_mode
routines.side_effects: Changes numeric policy and invalidates mode-keyed compiled records

routines.name: ir_init
routines.purpose: Initialize IR builder for new compilation
routines.side_effects: Clears IR buffer, resets write pointer

routines.name: ir_emit_stmt
routines.side_effects: Writes one statement record to IR buffer

routines.name: ir_emit_expr
routines.side_effects: Writes expression tree node

routines.name: ir_emit_var_ref
routines.side_effects: Writes variable reference node

routines.name: ir_emit_array_ref
routines.side_effects: Writes array element reference

routines.name: ir_emit_string_ref
routines.side_effects: Writes string reference node

routines.name: ir_emit_branch
routines.side_effects: Writes GOTO/GOSUB/IF-THEN branch

routines.name: ir_emit_loop
routines.side_effects: Writes loop descriptor (FOR, DO, etc.)

routines.name: ir_emit_literal_int
routines.side_effects: Writes integer literal node

routines.name: ir_emit_literal_float
routines.side_effects: Writes float literal node

routines.name: ir_emit_literal_str
routines.side_effects: Writes string literal node

routines.name: ir_finish_line
routines.side_effects: Validates IR completeness for line, returns to caller

routines.name: ir_get_buf_ptr
routines.side_effects: Returns current IR buffer position

routines.name: opt_run_passes
routines.side_effects: Runs all optimization passes over current IR

routines.name: opt_build_effect_summaries
routines.side_effects: One bottom-up pass; parent loops merge child masks

routines.name: opt_eligible_for_for_fast
routines.side_effects: Checks all FOR/NEXT fast-path eligibility conditions per §11

routines.name: opt_eligible_for_do_fast
routines.side_effects: Checks DO/LOOP fast-path eligibility (bare, WHILE, UNTIL)

routines.name: opt_check_invalidation
routines.purpose: Shared invalidation predicate; no body rescan
routines.side_effects: Reads cached POKE/SYS/CLR/DIM/callback/string barriers

routines.name: opt_check_aliasing
routines.purpose: Shared alias predicate; no body rescan
routines.side_effects: Reads cached alias/escape/bank-change facts

routines.name: opt_propagate_dirty
routines.side_effects: Propagates dirty masks through nested loop descriptors

routines.name: opt_select_branch_polarity
routines.side_effects: Selects branch polarity (UNTIL is NOT inverted by scattered NOT)

routines.name: opt_check_stop_poll
routines.purpose: STOP polling eligibility for long loops
routines.outputs: C=1 if long loop needing poll
routines.side_effects: Determines if loop body is long enough to require STOP polling

routines.name: codegen_init
routines.side_effects: Resets code emitter state, clears relocation list

routines.name: codegen_emit_stmt
routines.side_effects: Emits native code for one statement

routines.name: codegen_emit_for_fast
routines.side_effects: Emits direct integer FOR/NEXT fast path: init var, compare, branch, update

routines.name: codegen_emit_for_generic
routines.side_effects: Emits frame-based generic FOR/NEXT with full error handling

routines.name: codegen_emit_do_fast
routines.side_effects: Emits native backedge for bare DO/LOOP or native pretest/posttest

routines.name: codegen_emit_do_generic
routines.side_effects: Emits frame-based generic DO/LOOP with full condition evaluation

routines.name: codegen_emit_exit
routines.side_effects: Emits EXIT DO/FOR: resolves descriptor target or generic control stack

routines.name: codegen_emit_if
routines.side_effects: Emits IF cond THEN stmt [ELSE stmt]

routines.name: codegen_emit_gosub
routines.side_effects: Emits GOSUB with push return address, validate line exists

routines.name: codegen_emit_return
routines.side_effects: Emits RETURN: pop return address, validate nesting

routines.name: codegen_emit_on
routines.side_effects: Emits multi-way branch

routines.name: codegen_emit_print
routines.side_effects: Emits PRINT with formatting, semicolons, commas, TAB, SPC

routines.name: codegen_emit_input
routines.side_effects: Emits INPUT with prompt, channel select, type coercion

routines.name: codegen_emit_let
routines.side_effects: Emits assignment with type promotion if needed

routines.name: codegen_emit_dim
routines.side_effects: Emits array dimension allocation call

routines.name: codegen_emit_data
routines.side_effects: Emits DATA record into data section

routines.name: codegen_emit_read
routines.side_effects: Emits READ with type coercion from DATA stream

routines.name: codegen_emit_reloc
routines.side_effects: Records a relocation entry for linker

routines.name: codegen_finish_line
routines.side_effects: Validates code size, updates code layout, commits relocations

routines.name: codegen_get_code_ptr
routines.side_effects: Returns current code emission position

routines.name: diag_format_error
routines.side_effects: Formats error string with line number and context

routines.name: diag_format_warning
routines.side_effects: Formats non-fatal warning

routines.name: diag_format_source_context
routines.side_effects: Extracts and formats source context around error point

routines.name: diag_print_error
routines.side_effects: Outputs formatted error to current channel

routines.name: diag_error_from_kernal
routines.side_effects: Converts KERNAL carry/error to BASIC error code

routines.name: math_log
routines.side_effects: Updates IEEE flags when enabled

routines.name: math_exp
routines.side_effects: Updates IEEE flags when enabled

routines.name: math_sqr
routines.side_effects: Updates IEEE flags when enabled

routines.name: math_pow
routines.side_effects: Updates IEEE flags when enabled

routines.name: math_rnd
routines.side_effects: Updates deterministic RND state per profile

routines.name: math_rint
routines.purpose: Round to integer per rounding mode

routines.name: math_bin32str
routines.side_effects: Converts to IEEE 754 binary32 hex string

routines.name: math_val32
routines.side_effects: Parses 8-digit hex string → numeric

routines.name: var_resolve
routines.outputs: X/Y=cell address, C=0; C=1/A=error on malformed or stale descriptor
routines.side_effects: Validates VD shape and resolves direct or arena-backed descriptor to live memory cell

routines.name: var_load_int
routines.side_effects: Loads 16-bit integer through a validated VD descriptor

routines.name: var_store_int
routines.side_effects: Stores 16-bit integer through a validated VI request and VD descriptor

routines.name: var_load_float
routines.side_effects: Loads 5-byte float through a validated VD descriptor

routines.name: var_store_float
routines.side_effects: Stores 5-byte float through a validated VF request and VD descriptor

routines.name: var_load_string
routines.side_effects: Loads string descriptor through a validated VD descriptor

routines.name: var_store_string
routines.side_effects: Stores string descriptor through a validated VS request and VD descriptor

routines.name: var_promote_to_float
routines.side_effects: Promotes integer to float

routines.name: var_coerce
routines.purpose: Type coercion with error on loss
routines.inputs: FAC1=value, target variable kind in A
routines.outputs: result in FAC1 or X/Y, C=0; C=1 on unsupported or lossy conversion
routines.side_effects: Coerces value to target variable kind and reclassifies FAC before integer narrowing

routines.name: var_set_type
routines.side_effects: Updates kind tag in a validated VD descriptor

routines.name: arr_dim
routines.side_effects: Allocates and clears array-arena pages, then publishes one AD descriptor

routines.name: arr_resolve_element
routines.outputs: X/Y=selected $DE00 element address, C=error, A=error code
routines.side_effects: Bounds-checks subscripts, computes element offset

routines.name: arr_load_element
routines.outputs: integer in X/Y, float in FAC1, or string pointer X/Y and length A; C=error
routines.side_effects: Loads typed element from resolved address

routines.name: arr_store_element
routines.inputs: X/Y=12-byte AS request; FAC1 supplies float values
routines.side_effects: Stores typed element to resolved address

routines.name: arr_redim
routines.outputs: C=error, A=ERR_REDIM_ARRAY for a live descriptor
routines.side_effects: Rejects an already dimensioned array with stock `REDIM'D ARRAY` behavior

routines.name: arr_free
routines.side_effects: Releases owned array pages and invalidates the AD descriptor

routines.name: arr_check_bounds
routines.side_effects: Bounds check without resolution

routines.name: str_alloc
routines.inputs: X/Y=SA request (magic, destination SD pointer, length)
routines.outputs: C=success/error; destination receives validated 12-byte SD descriptor
routines.side_effects: Allocates one owned page in the string arena for nonempty payloads and initializes the caller-owned SD descriptor

routines.name: str_from_bytes
routines.purpose: Import a bounded normal-memory byte string into one SD
routines.inputs: X/Y=SB request (magic, destination SD, source pointer, length)
routines.outputs: C=success/error; destination receives an arena-backed SD
routines.side_effects: Atomically imports bytes and replaces the destination ownership

routines.name: str_export_bytes
routines.purpose: Export one validated SD to a bounded normal-memory buffer
routines.inputs: X/Y=SE request (magic, source SD, destination pointer, capacity)
routines.outputs: A=length and C=0, or C=1 on validation/capacity error
routines.side_effects: Copies only after descriptor and capacity validation

routines.name: str_free
routines.side_effects: Returns the owned string-arena page and invalidates the SD descriptor; rejects stale and double frees

routines.name: str_assign
routines.inputs: X/Y=SX request (magic, destination SD pointer, source SD pointer)
routines.side_effects: Atomically replaces the destination with an independent arena-backed copy of the validated source

routines.name: str_copy
routines.inputs: X/Y=SX request (magic, destination SD pointer, source SD pointer)
routines.side_effects: Atomically replaces the destination with an independent arena-backed copy of the validated source

routines.name: str_concat
routines.inputs: X/Y=SC request (magic, destination SD pointer, left SD pointer, right SD pointer)
routines.outputs: C=success/error; destination receives result SD descriptor
routines.side_effects: Atomically allocates and writes an alias-safe concatenation; rejects results longer than 255 bytes

routines.name: str_left
routines.inputs: X/Y=SL request (magic, destination SD pointer, source SD pointer, count)
routines.outputs: C=success/error; destination receives result SD descriptor
routines.side_effects: Atomically allocates and writes alias-safe LEFT$ bytes

routines.name: str_right
routines.inputs: X/Y=SR request (magic, destination SD pointer, source SD pointer, count)
routines.outputs: C=success/error; destination receives result SD descriptor
routines.side_effects: Atomically allocates and writes alias-safe RIGHT$ bytes

routines.name: str_mid
routines.inputs: X/Y=SM request (magic, destination SD pointer, source SD pointer, one-based start, count)
routines.outputs: C=success/error; destination receives result SD descriptor
routines.side_effects: Atomically allocates and writes alias-safe MID$ bytes

routines.name: str_len
routines.side_effects: Returns string length

routines.name: str_cmp
routines.inputs: X/Y=SP request (magic, left SD pointer, right SD pointer)
routines.side_effects: PETSCII bytewise comparison per stock semantics

routines.name: str_chr
routines.inputs: X/Y=SH request (magic, destination SD pointer, PETSCII byte)
routines.outputs: C=success/error; destination receives one-byte SD descriptor
routines.side_effects: Creates one-character string using C64 PETSCII byte semantics

routines.name: str_asc
routines.side_effects: Errors on an empty string per stock behavior

routines.name: str_val
routines.side_effects: Parses numeric string to float

routines.name: str_str
routines.inputs: X/Y=ST request (magic, destination SD pointer); FAC1=numeric value
routines.outputs: C=success/error; destination receives formatted SD descriptor
routines.side_effects: Formats float to numeric string

routines.name: math_add
routines.outputs: FAC1=result; math_status=MATH_OK/error; C=0 success, C=1 error

routines.name: math_sub
routines.outputs: FAC1=result; math_status=MATH_OK/error; C=0 success, C=1 error

routines.name: math_mul
routines.outputs: FAC1=result; math_status=MATH_OK/error; C=0 success, C=1 error

routines.name: math_div
routines.outputs: FAC1=result; math_status=MATH_OK/error; C=0 success, C=1 error
routines.side_effects: Returns MATH_ERR_DIV_ZERO with C=1 for a zero divisor; may update IEEE flags when enabled

routines.name: math_cmp
routines.outputs: A=$FF if FAC1<ARG, $00 if equal, $01 if FAC1>ARG; N/Z reflect A

routines.name: math_int
routines.purpose: Stock BASIC `INT`: greatest integer not greater than the operand

routines.name: math_fpe
routines.outputs: A=$FF for negative, $00 for zero, $01 for positive; N/Z reflect A
routines.side_effects: Sets flags: N=negative, Z=zero

routines.name: math_int_to_float
routines.inputs: X=low byte and Y=high byte of signed 16-bit integer

routines.name: math_float_to_int
routines.outputs: X=low byte and Y=high byte of signed 16-bit integer; C=0 success, C=1 unrepresentable
routines.side_effects: Truncates toward zero

routines.name: math_u24_to_float
routines.purpose: Exact unsigned 24-bit integer to packed-float conversion
routines.side_effects: Sets math_fac_type to FLOAT

routines.name: math_add_int
routines.inputs: X/Y=pointer to 4-byte record: signed lhs low/high, signed rhs low/high
routines.outputs: Record bytes 0..1=signed sum; C=0 success, C=1 signed overflow

routines.name: math_sub_int
routines.inputs: X/Y=pointer to 4-byte record: signed lhs low/high, signed rhs low/high
routines.outputs: Record bytes 0..1=signed difference; C=0 success, C=1 signed overflow

routines.name: math_mul_int
routines.inputs: X/Y=pointer to 4-byte record: signed lhs low/high, signed rhs low/high
routines.outputs: Record bytes 0..1=signed product; C=0 success, C=1 signed overflow

routines.name: math_div_int
routines.inputs: X/Y=pointer to 4-byte record: signed dividend low/high, signed divisor low/high
routines.outputs: Record bytes 0..1=signed quotient truncated toward zero; C=0 success, C=1 division by zero or -32768/-1 overflow
routines.side_effects: Division-by-zero and overflow follow numeric profile

routines.name: ctrl_for_init
routines.side_effects: Pushes FOR frame onto control stack, initializes variable

routines.name: ctrl_for_next
routines.outputs: C=1 loop done, C=0 loop continues
routines.side_effects: Increments variable, compares to limit, branches or pops

routines.name: ctrl_do_init
routines.side_effects: Pushes DO frame onto control stack

routines.name: ctrl_loop_test
routines.side_effects: Tests WHILE/UNTIL condition at loop bottom (posttest)

routines.name: ctrl_exit_loop
routines.side_effects: Pops control stack to matching DO, jumps past LOOP

routines.name: ctrl_gosub
routines.side_effects: Pushes return address, jumps to target

routines.name: ctrl_return
routines.side_effects: Pops return address, validates GOSUB nesting

routines.name: ctrl_on_goto
routines.inputs: expr result in A, table ptr
routines.side_effects: Multi-way branch: select line from table

routines.name: ctrl_on_gosub
routines.inputs: expr result in A, table ptr
routines.side_effects: Multi-way subroutine call

routines.name: ctrl_stop
routines.inputs: generated continuation point and runtime frame handle
routines.side_effects: Publishes a generation-checked continuation descriptor, returns to shell

routines.name: ctrl_end
routines.inputs: A=0 development editor, A<>0 standalone inspection shell
routines.outputs: standalone does not return; development returns through editor dispatcher
routines.side_effects: Calls unified graphics exit, then development editor or standalone READY shell

routines.name: ctrl_reset
routines.purpose: Clear control and continuation state without changing shells
routines.side_effects: Invalidates the published continuation and all tagged frames

routines.name: ctrl_cont
routines.side_effects: Validates/restores compiled PC and runtime control/stack state

routines.name: ctrl_check_stop
routines.side_effects: Polls STOP key via KERNAL bridge; bounded iteration check

routines.name: ctrl_push_loop_frame
routines.side_effects: Pushes loop frame (FOR/DO) onto control stack

routines.name: ctrl_pop_loop_frame
routines.side_effects: Pops loop frame from control stack

routines.name: io_print_value
routines.inputs: value in FAC1, type tag in A
routines.side_effects: Formats and outputs value (numeric or string) to current channel

routines.name: io_print_newline
routines.side_effects: Outputs CR (carriage return)

routines.name: io_print_space
routines.side_effects: Outputs space character

routines.name: io_print_tab
routines.side_effects: Outputs spaces to reach tab stop

routines.name: io_print_comma
routines.side_effects: Outputs spaces to next 10-column zone

routines.name: io_print_semicolon
routines.side_effects: Suppresses newline/space (no output)

routines.name: io_input_value
routines.side_effects: Prints prompt "? ", reads value, coerces, stores

routines.name: io_input_string
routines.side_effects: Prints prompt, reads string line

routines.name: io_get
routines.side_effects: Reads single character from keyboard buffer into variable

routines.name: math_to_arg_byte
routines.purpose: Narrow a numeric expression to the shared unsigned argument-byte domain
routines.outputs: A=unsigned byte and C=0, or A=ERR_ILLEGAL_QUANTITY and C=1
routines.side_effects: Rejects negative, fractional, and greater-than-255 values

routines.name: io_cmd
routines.inputs: X/Y=IC record containing one unsigned logical-file byte
routines.side_effects: CMD: redirects output to channel

routines.name: rio_load
routines.inputs: X/Y=RL record with unsigned length/device/secondary bytes and address
routines.side_effects: KERNAL-bridged direct program load

routines.name: rio_save
routines.purpose: Language SAVE: token-class encode, materialize, KERNAL SAVE
routines.inputs: X/Y=RS record with filename/device and exclusive workspace range
routines.side_effects: Encodes published program by tokens (C2>3.5>V2), writes workspace, KERNAL SAVE

routines.name: rio_verify
routines.purpose: Language VERIFY: pure byte equality vs SAVE emission
routines.inputs: X/Y=RL record with filename/device and candidate image address
routines.side_effects: Compares memory against same token-class emission SAVE would write

routines.name: rio_open
routines.inputs: X/Y=RO record with unsigned logical/device/secondary/length bytes
routines.side_effects: KERNAL-bridged file open

routines.name: rio_close
routines.inputs: X/Y=RC record containing one unsigned logical-file byte
routines.side_effects: KERNAL-bridged file close

routines.name: rio_chrin
routines.inputs: X/Y=RI record containing one unsigned logical-file byte
routines.side_effects: KERNAL-bridged character input

routines.name: rio_chrout
routines.inputs: X/Y=RW record containing unsigned logical-file and value bytes
routines.side_effects: KERNAL-bridged character output

routines.name: rio_clrchn
routines.side_effects: KERNAL-bridged channel restore

routines.name: err_raise
routines.side_effects: Closes/restores channels, calls unified graphics exit, formats stock message, enters profile READY shell

routines.name: err_raise_direct
routines.outputs: A=error code, C=1 after development READY transition
routines.side_effects: Formats error for direct mode: "?CODE ERROR"

routines.name: err_from_kernal
routines.side_effects: Translates KERNAL carry/status to BASIC error code

routines.name: err_syntax
routines.side_effects: Shortcut: raises ?SYNTAX ERROR

routines.name: err_type
routines.side_effects: Shortcut: raises ?TYPE MISMATCH ERROR

routines.name: err_overflow
routines.side_effects: Shortcut: raises ?OVERFLOW ERROR

routines.name: err_outofmemory
routines.side_effects: Shortcut: raises ?OUT OF MEMORY ERROR

routines.name: err_undefdfunction
routines.side_effects: Shortcut: raises ?UNDEF'D FUNCTION ERROR

routines.name: err_break
routines.side_effects: Raises `?BREAK IN line`, publishes CONT descriptor

routines.name: err_save_cont
routines.side_effects: Copies all required resumable state before stack unwind

routines.name: inspect_shell
routines.side_effects: Main REPL loop: reads input, dispatches restricted grammar

routines.name: inspect_parse_command
routines.side_effects: Validates input against restricted grammar

routines.name: inspect_print_var
routines.side_effects: Resolves and prints scalar or array element

routines.name: inspect_print_string_var
routines.side_effects: Resolves and prints string variable or array element

routines.name: inspect_cont
routines.side_effects: Restores compiled continuation descriptor and runtime state

routines.name: inspect_list_loader
routines.side_effects: Prints exactly `2026 SYS2061`

routines.name: inspect_run
routines.side_effects: Reinitializes and enters current compiled image

routines.name: inspect_load
routines.side_effects: Uses standalone KERNAL file path/current `fa`

routines.name: inspect_save
routines.side_effects: Uses standalone KERNAL file path/current `fa`

routines.name: inspect_verify
routines.side_effects: Uses standalone KERNAL file path/current `fa`

routines.name: inspect_clr
routines.side_effects: Clears variables, arrays, strings, frames, continuation

routines.name: inspect_wedge
routines.side_effects: Calls standalone wedge service; shares `fa`

routines.name: arena_init_all
routines.side_effects: Constructs arena directory, stamps initial generations for all arenas

routines.name: arena_create
routines.side_effects: Creates one typed arena, allocates pages

routines.name: arena_destroy
routines.side_effects: Destroys arena, frees pages

routines.name: arena_check_integrity
routines.side_effects: Validates canary, checksum, generation

routines.name: arena_reset
routines.side_effects: Deterministic reset: clears data, increments generation

routines.name: arena_invalidate_generation
routines.side_effects: Increments generation, invalidates stale handles

routines.name: arena_get_handle
routines.side_effects: Resolves arena-relative offset to stable handle

routines.name: arena_handle_valid
routines.side_effects: Checks type, owner, bounds, generation

routines.name: page_alloc_init
routines.side_effects: Initializes free-page bitmap from detected geoRAM capacity

routines.name: page_alloc
routines.side_effects: Allocates pages from free bitmap

routines.name: page_free
routines.side_effects: Returns pages to free bitmap and checks ownership/generation

routines.name: page_alloc_count
routines.side_effects: Supports at least 2,048 pages at the 512 KiB minimum

routines.name: page_alloc_largest
routines.side_effects: Returns largest contiguous extent

routines.name: page_check_in_range
routines.outputs: C=1 if out of profile/owner bounds
routines.side_effects: Uses logical page/block capacity from installed profile

routines.name: overlay_enter
routines.side_effects: Swaps in overlay page, adjusts dispatch table

routines.name: overlay_exit
routines.side_effects: Restores previous overlay page

routines.name: overlay_resolve
routines.side_effects: Resolves routine ID to geoRAM page and entry offset

routines.name: overlay_validate
routines.side_effects: Validates overlay directory checksums and ABI versions

routines.name: detect_expansion
routines.purpose: Dual-device non-destructive expansion probe and profile publication
routines.outputs: C=0 with selected expansion profile, C=1 when neither device is valid
routines.side_effects: Probes both devices with real non-destructive probes, prefers geoRAM, publishes store/assist policy

routines.name: detect_georam
routines.side_effects: Full non-destructive probe before arenas are trusted

routines.name: detect_save_state
routines.side_effects: Saves current geoRAM selection, probe bytes, processor status

routines.name: detect_probe_pattern1
routines.side_effects: Writes and verifies pattern order 1 on candidate pages

routines.name: detect_probe_pattern2
routines.side_effects: Writes and verifies pattern order 2 (debug: catches floating bus)

routines.name: detect_probe_aliasing
routines.side_effects: Probes address-bit aliasing to bound total capacity

routines.name: detect_restore_state
routines.side_effects: Restores all saved bytes, selection, and processor status

routines.name: detect_check_minimum
routines.side_effects: Compares detected capacity against build-declared minimum

routines.name: detect_publish_profile
routines.side_effects: Records 16 KiB block count, alias result, integrity fingerprint

routines.name: detect_validate_profile
routines.side_effects: Bounded continuity check; mismatch calls fatal path, never resizes

routines.name: detect_reu
routines.outputs: C=0 present and sized, C=1 absent/undersized; fingerprint published
routines.side_effects: Saves/restores REC registers and REU probe bytes; publishes capacity and fingerprint

routines.name: detect_reu_save_state
routines.purpose: Save REC registers and CPU port before REU probe
routines.side_effects: Snapshots REC $DF01-$DF0A and $01

routines.name: detect_reu_restore_state
routines.purpose: Restore REC registers and CPU port after REU probe
routines.side_effects: Restores REC $DF01-$DF0A and $01

routines.name: detect_reu_check_minimum
routines.purpose: REU capacity threshold check (>=8 banks / 512 KiB)
routines.side_effects: none

routines.name: expansion_publish
routines.purpose: Publish dual-device expansion profile for the session
routines.inputs: expansion_* BSS fields set by selector
routines.side_effects: Recomputes expansion_fingerprint and bumps generation

routines.name: expansion_clear
routines.purpose: Clear expansion profile before probe or on failure
routines.side_effects: Zeros store, assist, capacities, fingerprints, session_ready

routines.name: expansion_check_skip_reload
routines.outputs: C=0 skip reload, C=1 must reload
routines.side_effects: none

routines.name: expansion_mark_ready
routines.side_effects: Sets expansion_image_fingerprint and expansion_session_ready

routines.name: ctx_init
routines.side_effects: Resets context stack pointer to empty

routines.name: ctx_push
routines.side_effects: Pushes selected block/page, P, declared registers/results; checks first

routines.name: ctx_pop
routines.side_effects: Pops complete caller context; detects underflow

routines.name: ctx_depth
routines.side_effects: Returns current nesting depth (for debug)

routines.name: ctx_check_overflow
routines.side_effects: Checks if next push would overflow

routines.name: resident_main
routines.side_effects: Captures editor input and dispatches complete lines

routines.name: resident_poll_input
routines.side_effects: Calls foreground `GETIN` bridge only

routines.name: resident_submit_line
routines.side_effects: Calls direct-prefix dispatch or geoRAM editor service

routines.name: resident_assert_boundary
routines.side_effects: Checks `$01=$35`, D clear, gate mirror, stack watermark

routines.name: fatal_georam
routines.side_effects: Stops allocation/execution, restores selection/mapping/P, closes channels, reports reinstall requirement

routines.name: fatal_restore_machine
routines.side_effects: Restores page selection, `$01`, channels, graphics, IRQ state

routines.name: editor_submit_line
routines.side_effects: Parses optional line number; publishes source/code together or changes nothing

routines.name: editor_delete_line
routines.side_effects: Runs dependency repair and one-generation deletion publish

routines.name: editor_detokenize_line
routines.side_effects: Allocates scratch text only

routines.name: editor_list_range
routines.side_effects: Streams canonical detokenization through output path

routines.name: editor_ready_transition
routines.side_effects: Atomically changes mailbox/editor state to READY or error

routines.name: program_classify_file
routines.side_effects: Reads only bounded header bytes

routines.name: program_decode_stock
routines.side_effects: Validates `$0801`, links, ordering, terminators, stock tokens/contexts

routines.name: program_encode_stock
routines.side_effects: Canonically recomputes every next-line pointer

routines.name: program_decode_basic35
routines.side_effects: Validates `$1001` links, ordering, terminators for Plus/4 PRG

routines.name: program_encode_basic35
routines.side_effects: Prepends `$1001` and recomputes absolute next-line pointers

routines.name: program_decode_extended
routines.side_effects: Validates magic, format/ABI version, token namespace, bounds

routines.name: program_encode_extended
routines.side_effects: Writes unambiguous versioned envelope

routines.name: program_select_save_format
routines.side_effects: Scans tokens outside REM/string/DATA; priority C2 > 3.5 > V2

routines.name: program_tx_begin
routines.side_effects: Allocates scratch directory/records

routines.name: program_tx_put_line
routines.side_effects: Replaces/inserts only scratch record

routines.name: program_tx_delete_line
routines.side_effects: Removes only scratch record

routines.name: program_tx_commit
routines.side_effects: Atomically swaps directory root

routines.name: program_tx_abort
routines.side_effects: Frees scratch; published root unchanged

routines.name: program_replace_from_load
routines.side_effects: Publishes only after format and dependency validation

routines.name: direct_probe_prefix
routines.side_effects: Does not tokenize wedge input

routines.name: direct_classify
routines.side_effects: Uses generated table only

routines.name: direct_execute_command
routines.side_effects: Dispatches NEW/RUN/CONT/CLR/LIST/COMPILE/file/mode commands

routines.name: direct_execute_temporary
routines.side_effects: Compiles, executes, and discards one-line temporary generation

routines.name: pipeline_compile_line
routines.side_effects: Runs boundaries 1-7 without publication

routines.name: pipeline_compile_program
routines.side_effects: Resolves all dirty records/layout/dependencies

routines.name: pipeline_serialize_boundary
routines.side_effects: Debug/host replay artifact

routines.name: pipeline_validate_boundary
routines.side_effects: Checks schema/version/checksum

routines.name: pipeline_report_failure
routines.side_effects: Leaves all published outputs unchanged

routines.name: incremental_fingerprint
routines.side_effects: Includes all generations named by `DESIGN2.md` §6.2

routines.name: incremental_mark_dependents
routines.side_effects: Tracks branch, DATA, loop, subroutine, variable, layout effects

routines.name: incremental_resolve_dirty
routines.side_effects: Recompiles or relinks every required record

routines.name: incremental_publish
routines.side_effects: Atomically swaps both roots and image checksum

routines.name: incremental_can_run
routines.side_effects: Checks no dirty records, verified layout/checksum

routines.name: incremental_abort
routines.side_effects: Frees scratch, preserves last valid generation

routines.name: export_parse_command
routines.side_effects: Defaults filename `COMPILED`, device from persistent `fa`

routines.name: export_collect_dependencies
routines.side_effects: Rejects editor/compiler/source/geoRAM dependencies

routines.name: export_link_image
routines.side_effects: Resolves runtime helpers, metadata, descriptors, shell

routines.name: export_check_budgets
routines.side_effects: Proves `$0801-$CFFF` load range and disjoint workspace

routines.name: export_write_prg
routines.side_effects: Saves through KERNAL sequence to devices 8-11

routines.name: wedge_parse
routines.side_effects: Enforces direct-only grammar for $ @ / ! forms

routines.name: wedge_run_development
routines.purpose: Parse then dispatch one development wedge line
routines.outputs: C=error; A=$FF means normal BASIC input
routines.side_effects: May invoke KERNAL-backed wedge core handlers

routines.name: graphics_enter
routines.side_effects: Transactionally reserves `$DC00-$FF3F`, selects VIC bank 3/`$D018=$78`

routines.name: graphics_exit
routines.side_effects: Restores stock text/colors, invalidates graphics data, then restores ceiling

routines.name: graphics_matrix_copy
routines.side_effects: Uses chunked RAM-under-I/O gate with IRQ opportunities

routines.name: graphics_validate_bounds
routines.side_effects: Checks bitmap/matrix/color limits

routines.name: fp_set_rounding
routines.side_effects: Sets one of five specified rounding modes

routines.name: fp_test_flags
routines.side_effects: Tests current/sticky flags

routines.name: fp_load_constant
routines.side_effects: Produces specified special value/printed form

routines.name: data_read
routines.side_effects: Advances generation-checked DATA cursor and coerces stock-compatible value

routines.name: data_restore
routines.side_effects: Resolves first applicable DATA record and resets cursor

routines.name: data_reset
routines.side_effects: Initializes stream state for RUN/CLR policy

routines.name: fre_init
routines.purpose: Initialize FRE profile and export free baseline
routines.side_effects: Defaults fre_profile to expansion and fre_export_bytes to 38912

routines.name: fre_set_profile
routines.side_effects: Updates fre_profile

routines.name: fre_set_export_bytes
routines.inputs: A=lo, X=mid, Y=hi (24-bit little-endian free bytes)
routines.side_effects: Updates fre_export_bytes

routines.name: fre_query
routines.inputs: — (numeric FRE argument already discarded by caller)
routines.outputs: FAC1=free bytes as float, C clear
routines.side_effects: Reports expansion page free*256 or export free; never raw device capacity

routines.name: reu_xip_active
routines.purpose: REU XIP live-slot flag (BSS data symbol)
routines.outputs: byte: nonzero while $CE00 miss slot is live
routines.side_effects: Default 0; REU XIP module sets/clears; system_poke gates $CE00 on this

routines.name: system_peek
routines.side_effects: Reads real C64 CPU address space under documented banking policy

routines.name: system_poke
routines.side_effects: Writes real C64 address unless narrow control-plane protection denies it (ZP, high guard, $CE00 while reu_xip_active)

routines.name: system_sys
routines.outputs: returned registers per stock-visible policy, C=error
routines.side_effects: Calls user machine code with invalidation barrier

routines.name: system_usr
routines.side_effects: Calls user routine with declared compatibility ABI

routines.name: system_wait
routines.side_effects: Polls real address and bank-safe STOP at bounded cadence

routines.name: system_ti_load
routines.outputs: FAC1=current 24-bit jiffy value as an exact float
routines.side_effects: Reads IRQ-owned clock atomically

routines.name: system_ti_store
routines.side_effects: Validates and sets clock through approved path

routines.name: system_ti_string_load
routines.side_effects: Formats current clock with stock behavior

routines.name: system_ti_string_store
routines.side_effects: Parses/sets clock with stock behavior

routines.name: wedge_dispatch_development
routines.side_effects: Records kind and dispatches to the matching wedge core path

routines.name: wedge_format_directory
routines.side_effects: Replaces bounded wedge output buffer

routines.name: wedge_directory
routines.side_effects: Streams directory; never loads over current program/image

routines.name: wedge_load_absolute
routines.side_effects: Equivalent to `LOAD name,fa,1`

routines.name: wedge_status_or_command
routines.side_effects: Reads status, selects device 8-11, sends command, or lists @$

routines.name: wedge_stream_seq
routines.side_effects: Streams PETSCII; STOP closes channel

routines.name: wedge_confirm_destructive
routines.side_effects: Requires explicit confirmation

coverage.completion_rule: Every callable assembly routine listed in SKELETON.md section 6.3 through 6.47 must appear exactly once by name.
